reviews.review_title: Fun and Relaxing VR Mini Golf Experience
reviews.review_description:
Really enjoyed playing VR Mini Golf ⛳
The game has multiple environments to play in, which keeps it interesting and fun. The controls feel smooth and natural, and it’s easy to get used to the swing in VR.
It’s a relaxing game and perfect if you just want to chill and play some mini golf in different locations. Definitely a fun experience in VR.

A relaxing and cosy mini golf experience that’s easy to enjoy from the very first swing 😌
With more than a dozen colorful levels, the focus isn’t on scoring but on simply reaching the final hole and enjoying the journey. The vibrant visuals and laid-back atmosphere make it a perfect game to unwind 🏝️

Still in Early Access, but it already shows solid potential and is shaping up to be a charming, feel-good mini golf experience 🌈

reviews.review_title: A RELAXING SOLO MINI GOLF VR EXPERIENCE
reviews.review_description:
VR Mini Golf offers a smooth and enjoyable solo mini golf experience with intuitive controls and very satisfying ball physics.
Perfect for relaxing VR sessions, it focuses on precision, calm gameplay and the simple pleasure of mastering each course.
Available in early access, the devs are already working on promising updates.
Fantastic VR mini golf experience! ⛳️ The physics felt very realistic and the environments were immersive. Highly recommended!
Started to play, went to Settings to make a change and it said settings was not responding and it froze there. Wouldn't even let me turn off the headset. Waste of money and I can't get a refund :[

developer_response.body: The device settings freezing is completely unrelated to the app.

reviews.review_description: User friendly, perfect mini game great visuals.
